content: what is the summary of this file?

This document describes the development of a portable and low-cost thermal monitoring and imaging system based on the ESP32 microcontroller. The system uses an infrared thermal sensor to capture temperature data, which is then processed and visualized on a TFT display as a heatmap. The system has applications in temperature monitoring, human presence detection, and educational demonstrations, but has limitations such as low spatial resolution and limited accuracy compared to commercial systems.
